What We Do

SERVICES

We supply steel and arrange everything needed to get it to you — simple as that.

01
Steel Supply
Full range of structural steel — TMT bars, MS angles, channels, plates, pipes, round bars and flat bars. All grades, all sizes. Ready stock, competitive rates. We supply to contractors, builders, factories, and fabricators.
02
Cutting
In-house cutting to your required lengths and dimensions. Bring your measurements or bar bending schedule. Machine cutting ensures clean ends and accurate lengths. Minimal cutting charges on bulk orders.
03
Transport
We arrange delivery to your site. Vehicle available for bulk orders. Call to confirm your location and quantity — we'll sort the logistics. Pickup from our yard is also available same day.
04
Bulk Orders
Volume discounts for large orders. Ideal for construction projects, factory requirements, and regular contractor needs. Call us with your full requirement list and we'll give you the best rate.

Common Questions

FAQ

Questions contractors and builders ask before placing an order.

Which TMT grade is right for my building?
+
Fe500 is standard for most residential RCC work. Fe500D is recommended for seismic zones — the 'D' means higher ductility so the bar bends rather than snapping under stress. Fe550 is for heavy industrial structures. Not sure? Share your zone and structural drawings and we'll advise.
What is the minimum order quantity?
+
There is no minimum for self-pickup from our yard. For arranged delivery, a minimum of 1 tonne is preferred to make transport cost-effective. Smaller quantities are always welcome for pickup.
Do you provide test certificates?
+
Yes. Mill Test Certificates (MTC) are available for BIS certified stock, showing chemical composition and tensile data. Essential for government or tendered projects — please request at time of ordering.
How far do you arrange transport?
+
We arrange delivery across the service area. Transport cost depends on quantity and distance. Share your site address and order size on WhatsApp and we'll quote a delivery rate promptly.
Can you cut steel to my dimensions?
+
Yes — in-house cutting is available. Bring your bar bending schedule or simply your dimensions. For large jobs, call ahead so we can prepare. Cutting charges are minimal and often waived on bulk orders.
Do you offer bulk discounts?
+
Yes. Volume discounts are available for large orders. The rate depends on quantity, material type, and current market price. Call or WhatsApp with your complete requirement list and we'll give you the best rate we can offer.
What payment methods do you accept?
+
We accept UPI, bank transfer (NEFT/RTGS), and cash. Invoices issued for all transactions. Regular contractors can discuss credit terms after the first few orders.
How soon will I get a quote?
+
Within 2 hours on WhatsApp for standard items. Complex or multi-type orders may take slightly longer. For urgent requirements, call us directly — we'll prioritise your inquiry.
